_meta.dataset: Reference quotes template — golden fixtures for the convergence-to-zero validation harness
_meta.purpose: The operator fills this from REAL РЖД квитанции (ГУ-27у тарифные отметки) and/or RailTarif runs. Each record is a golden route the engine must reproduce to EXACTLY 0₽ diff. This template defines the field contract; populate `records[]` and DELETE the example rows (marked _isExample:true).
howToUse: 1. Open a real РЖД квитанция (ГУ-27у) or run the same route in RailTarif/РЖД calc.
2. Copy the numbers VERBATIM — never OCR-guess, never round. A wrong digit poisons the golden.
3. Fill one record per route. For групповая/маршрутная отправка also fill ref.perWagon (the per-wagon tariff tiers) — the harness diffs per-wagon, then the sum.
4. Set source to 'квитанция' (deterministic, every-commit golden, Layer A) or 'railtariff' (live cross-check, Layer B).
5. refTariffRub_noVat is the load-bearing number the engine must hit to 0₽. refTariffRub_withVat is a cross-check only (НДС is applied last and externally).

6. If you do not know whether the квитанция «Взыскано» is with or without НДС, fill BOTH the value AND vatStatus:'unknown' and add a note — the harness will flag it YELLOW until disambiguated, never silently assume.

fieldContract.origin: { name: station name as on квитанция, esr: 6-digit ЕСР код, road?: дорога abbrev } — origin station of the loaded leg
fieldContract.dest: { name, esr, road? } — destination station of the loaded leg
fieldContract.etsngCode: 6-digit ЕТСНГ code of the cargo (drives class + МВН). e.g. '232431' = щебень н.п.
fieldContract.freightClass: 1 | 2 | 3 — tariff class for the etsngCode (cross-check vs etsng-classes.json; нерудные = 1)
fieldContract.wagonType: canonical wagon code: 'ПВ' полувагон | 'ПЛ' платформа | 'КР' крытый | 'ЦС' цистерна | ... (see tr1-scheme-classifier-extended.json)
fieldContract.ownership: 'own' (собственный/арендованный — И-схема N8 + порожний N25, БЕЗ В) | 'rzd' (общий/инвентарный парк — И + В)
fieldContract.shipmentType: 'wagon' повагонная | 'group' групповая | 'route' маршрутная — affects the отправочный coefficient (K4)
fieldContract.weightTons: chargeable weight basis. For per-wagon records this is the TOTAL across all wagons; per-wagon net mass goes in ref.perWagon[].netT
fieldContract.asOfDate: YYYY-MM-DD — date the tariff was computed/issued. Drives indexation chronology selection.
fieldContract.refDistanceKm: тарифное расстояние in km from the квитанция/RailTarif (integer). The distance engine must reproduce this EXACTLY.
fieldContract.refTariffRub_noVat: провозная плата БЕЗ НДС, per the source, in whole ₽. THE primary 0₽-diff target. null if only the с-НДС figure is known.
fieldContract.refTariffRub_withVat: провозная плата С НДС, in whole ₽. Cross-check only. null if not on the source.
fieldContract.vatStatus: 'noVat' | 'withVat' | 'unknown' — what refTariffRub_* actually represents on the source document (квитанция тарифные отметки are usually без НДС but VERIFY).
fieldContract.ref.scheme: (optional) the tariff scheme the source used, e.g. '8' (N8). Helps localize a scheme-classifier divergence.
fieldContract.ref.tariffCoeff: (optional) the scenario coefficient printed/implied on the квитанция, e.g. 0.6999. KEY: квитанции show this is FIXED per scenario (own ПВ class-1 ГО), NOT distance-dependent — pin it.
fieldContract.ref.perWagon: (optional, групповая/маршрутная) [{ wagonNo, capacityT, netT, tariffRub }] — per-wagon tariff. Harness diffs each wagon's tariff by its weight tier, then the sum.
fieldContract.notes: free-text: anything that helps localize a divergence (узел crossing, special-distance corridor, weight-tier boundary observed, НДС ambiguity, ...)

_meta.convergenceContract: GREEN only when BOTH refDistanceKm AND refTariffRub_noVat are reproduced to exactly 0 (distance) / 0₽ (tariff). For per-wagon records, EVERY wagon tariff must match AND their sum must equal refTariffRub_noVat. Any non-zero diff stays YELLOW with the localized cause from VALIDATION_PLAN.md decision tree.
_meta.exampleNote: The rows below with _isExample:true use the project's golden anchors (Серпухов→Ревякино 74km; Москва-Южный Порт→Печора 1850km). Distances are real ТР-4 worked-example anchors; the ₽ values are PLACEHOLDERS (___FILL___) — replace the whole example block with real квитанции. See reference-quotes.json (already populated) for two fully-verified real квитанции (ЭФ164189, ЭТ201459) to use as the working golden set.

records._replaceMe: EXAMPLE — golden distance anchor #1. Replace ₽ with a real квитанция for this or any route.
records.notes: DISTANCE GOLDEN: 74 km is the CONFIRMED ТР-4 same-section subtraction anchor (Столбовая 109-35=74; Тула I-Курская 95-21=74). Reproducible offline against kniga1-sections.json. ₽ target is ___FILL___ from a real квитанция.

records._replaceMe: EXAMPLE — golden distance anchor #2. Replace ₽ with a real квитанция.
records.notes: DISTANCE GOLDEN: 1850 km = 1601+249 ТР-4 worked example. Long-haul stress + Moscow узел. Verify the узел 54 km adder fires (cross-line) and the N8 weight×distance grid snaps. ₽ target is ___FILL___.

records._replaceMe: EXAMPLE — per-wagon групповая template shape. Real worked instance lives in reference-quotes.json (ЭФ164189).
records.notes: PER-WAGON SHAPE: групповая/маршрутная отправка prices per wagon by weight tier, then sums. The harness must match EACH wagon's tariffRub by its (capacityT, netT) tier AND the sum = refTariffRub_noVat. квитанция «Взыскано» = sum of perWagon[].tariffRub. tariffCoeff 0.6999 = own ПВ / class-1 / групповая scenario (FIXED, not distance-dependent — confirmed across ЭФ164189 @2444km and ЭТ201459 @699km).
